label: MR-002 v1.1 STRUCTURAL SLICE — executability evidence only. No performance interpretation, no configuration comparison, and no gate verdict may be drawn from this artifact. Validation and sealed OOS remain sealed and unread.

v1_0_comparison.note: v1.0 produced ZERO orders on all 124 sessions with 8/8 fixtures passing. This is the structural question v1.1 exists to answer.

gross.note_on_dust: Sessions whose gross is below the threshold hold only solver dust (order 1e-17 NAV weight) left by reductions that did not land on exactly zero. They are economically empty. Ratios are NOT computed for them: dividing by dust manufactures meaningless numbers, and that division is the very pathology the homogeneous constraint form exists to avoid.
gross.note: low gross is a REGISTERED INTENDED CONSEQUENCE, not a defect

sector_topology.theory: >= 5 sectors are required for ANY positive feasible portfolio (20% sector-gross cap); reported counts use the frozen 1e-6 reporting threshold

REGISTERED_MEASURE_division_free.note: max over every homogeneous coupling row (expr - k*G <= 0) re-evaluated on the REALIZED allocation. This -- not any ratio -- attests compliance, and it is well-defined at G = 0.
